task_completion.description: Open the 'Embryos' sample image in Fiji/ImageJ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ImageJ/Fiji application window is open displaying the 'Embryos' sample image (a grayscale microscopy image of embryos).

task_completion.description: Apply Contrast-Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization (CLAHE) to enhance local details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for 'Enhance Local Contrast (CLAHE)' is visible, or there is a new image window showing a visibly higher-contrast, enhanced version of the embryos image with more pronounced local details.

task_completion.description: Create a side-by-side comparison montage of the images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A single image window displaying two embryos images side-by-side. This might be preceded by a 'Make Montage' dialog or canvas resizing actions.

task_completion.description: Verify the montage arrangement has the original image on the left and the enhanced version on the right.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the montage window, the left half shows the lower-contrast original image, and the right half shows the higher-contrast CLAHE-enhanced image.

task_completion.description: Save the final montage as a PNG file to the specified results directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box showing the file being saved as 'clahe_comparison.png' in the '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' directory, or a terminal/file explorer confirming the file exists at '/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/clahe_comparison.png'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ImageJ/Fiji GUI to perform the image processing tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with ImageJ menus (e.g., Process > Enhance Local Contrast, Image > Stacks > Make Montage) rather than running Python/ImageMagick scripts in a terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the montage using the software tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate steps like creating a stack, using the 'Make Montage' tool, or manually pasting into an expanded canvas, rather than downloading a pre-made montage.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file manually through the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog from ImageJ is visible, showing the correct path and filename being typed or selected.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'Embryos' sample image is a grayscale microscopy image with original dimensions of 1600x1200 pixels. A correct side-by-side montage will have dimensions of approximately 3200x1200 pixels. The CLAHE-enhanced image will have visibly higher local contrast (entropy gain of ~2.16) compared to the original. The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/clahe_comparison.png'.
